description:
Legal record (#2) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f.1r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Dated in the first third of Shevat 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE.

(Document #2) Real estate transaction for an upper-story apartment whose location is depicted in relation to a water "cistern." Both the Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic terms for "cistern" are employed in the construction "'גב הסהריג". The legal parties and, in some cases, shareholders mentioned in the transaction are Sitūt, her husband Barūkh b. Yaʿacov Ben-Barūkh, Nissim Danon, Avraham Zermagh, ʿAzūz Zermagh, and Moshe Shomer. The last person named may be identical to the scribe listed five years earlier in BL OR 5542.1 (PGPID 6205). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
